episode.title: MTG Fast Finance Ep 516: TMNT x Secret Lair Drop
episode.description:
James & Cliff walk you through the meta evolutions in Standard and Legacy this week, fast moving cards, cards to watch and the results of the TMNT Secret Lair drops this month.

Intro/Outro Music by Skylarka
